Notice Of Motion To Reopen/Extend Discovery Past Arbitration Cut-Off Dates
Off Calendar Mar-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David W. Chen, appeared for Defendant/Moving party
A. Jeanne Jorge, appeared for Plaintiff/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants Paul Lee & Song Lee's Motion To Reopen/Extend Discovery Past Arbitration Cut-Off Dates is granted, limited to medical treatment and damages since March 1, 2006. Any additional discovery will not be allowed without separate application and showing of good cause. There is no showing of good cause for not taking discovery prior to the arbitration hearing regarding Plaintiff's treatment in December. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
